description_long: This filing cabinet features a modern, geometric design with three horizontally stacked drawers, each slightly offset to create a dynamic, layered appearance. The main body is a deep blue color, while the top and base are finished in matte black, giving it a bold, contemporary look. The drawers appear to lack visible handles, suggesting a push-to-open mechanism or recessed grip. The cabinet is constructed from what appears to be metal, likely steel, with a smooth, hard surface. Its proportions are low and wide, making it suitable for placement under desks or against walls in urban office environments. The overall aesthetic is minimalist and functional, with no visible label holders or lock mechanisms.
description: A modern, low-profile filing cabinet with three offset blue drawers and a matte black top and base, featuring a sleek, handle-less design.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing three offset blue drawers and the matte black top, highlighting the layered, staggered drawer design.
description_view_1: Side view emphasizing the depth of the drawers and the pronounced offset of the middle drawer.
description_view_2: Rear angled view showing the back and side of the cabinet, with the staggered drawer arrangement visible but no handles or label holders.
description_view_3: Direct side view displaying the clean, uninterrupted lines of the cabinet and the uniform drawer faces.
